sql.value: select m.id, m.provider_id, m.model_name, m.context_window, m.input_price, m.output_price, m.is_default, m.sort, m.enable_status, m.remark, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.is_deleted, m.revision, p.provider_name as provider_name from ai_model m left join ai_model_provider p on p.id = m.provider_id where m.is_deleted=0 #[and m.provider_id = :providerId] #[and m.enable_status = :enableStatus] #[and m.model_name like :modelName] order by m.sort desc, m.id desc
